metadata.framework_name: ASTO (Astrological System & Trading Operations) Master Unified Framework
metadata.description: The ultimate synthesis of all provided data, including Recursive Self-Improvement (RSI), AlphaEvolve-inspired algorithmic discovery, and self-evolving architecture for the AFE methodology.

meta_levels.Level_1: System improves its own features, models, and rules.
meta_levels.Level_2: System improves the improvement loop itself (convergence, regression risk).
meta_levels.Level_3: Theoretically infinite meta-improvement bounded by compute.

evolutionary_operators.Mutation: Node replacement, subtree insertion, parameter perturbation.
evolutionary_operators.Crossover: Subtree exchange, module combination, hybrid synthesis.
evolutionary_operators.Selection: Elitist + tournament selection based on 5-year Sharpe ratio.

llm_guided_evolution.evaluation: Generate candidate code → Compile/Execute → Score vs. Complexity.

technical_paths.Model_Level: Online learning with EWC for catastrophic forgetting prevention.
technical_paths.Context_Evolution: Mem0-style memory systems for permanent, queryable knowledge.
technical_paths.Meta_Learning: MAML for few-shot adaptation to new instruments.
technical_paths.Architecture_Level: NAS for GNN structures and dynamic layer expansion.

bayesian_optimization.search_space: 500+ hyperparameters (Aspect Orbs, Dignity Weights, Confluence Thresholds).

automl_methodology_optimization.hierarchical_planning: Composition graph for Astro Feature Engineering, ML Architecture, and Risk Management.

probability_engine.formula: P_MASTER = Base(0.5) * AFE(1.0-12.0) * KCIL(0.6-1.6) * Chart_Type(1.0-1.4) * Chaldean(0.5-1.8) * Uranian(0.7-1.5) * Harmonic(0.8-1.3) * Progressions(0.9-1.4) * Boolean_Gates * Technical_Veto(0.0-1.0)
